content.text: These are ingredients obtained at the Gas-Mart and used to mix with drugs to change effects, value and addictiveness of the drugs.

rows.Name: Cuke
rows.Description: A refreshing can of Cuke that leaves you feeling energized. It's heaven in a can.
rows.Effect Replacements: Euphoric → LaxativeFoggy → CyclopeanGingeritis → Thought-ProvokingMunchies → AthleticSlippery → MunchiesSneaky → ParanoiaToxic → Euphoric

rows.Name: Banana
rows.Description: Elongated yellow fruit, rich in potassium.
rows.Effect Replacements: Calming → SneakyCyclopean → Thought-ProvokingDisorienting → FocusedEnergizing → Thought-ProvokingFocused → Seizure-InducingLong Faced → RefreshingParanoia → JennerisingSmelly → Anti-GravityToxic → Smelly

rows.Name: Paracetamol
rows.Description: Mild over-the-counter painkiller.
rows.Effect Replacements: Calming → SlipperyElectrifying → AthleticEnergizing → ParanoiaFocused → GingeritisFoggy → CalmingGlowing → ToxicMunchies → Anti-GravityParanoia → BaldingSpicy → Bright-EyedToxic → Tropic Thunder

rows.Name: Donut
rows.Description: Yummy strawberry frosted donut.
rows.Effect Replacements: Anti-Gravity → SlipperyBalding → SneakyCalorie-Dense → ExplosiveFocused → EuphoricJennerising → GingeritisMunchies → CalmingShrinking → Energizing

rows.Name: Viagor
rows.Description: Medication that is used to get you chubbed-up.
rows.Effect Replacements: Athletic → SneakyDisorienting → ToxicEuphoric → Bright-EyedLaxative → CalmingShrinking → Gingeritis

rows.Name: Mouth Wash
rows.Description: Antiseptic mouth wash for a minty fresh breath.
rows.Effect Replacements: Calming → Anti-GravityCalorie-Dense → SneakyExplosive → SedatingFocused → Jennerising

rows.Name: Flu Medicine
rows.Description: Pain reliever and Mild sedative used to alleviate flu symptoms.
rows.Effect Replacements: Athletic → MunchiesCalming → Bright-EyedCyclopean → FoggyElectrifying → RefreshingEuphoric → ToxicFocused → CalmingLaxative → EuphoricMunchies → SlipperyShrinking → ParanoiaThought-Provoking → Gingeritis

rows.Name: Gasoline
rows.Description: A jerry can full of gasoline.
rows.Effect Replacements: Disorienting → GlowingElectrifying → DisorientingEnergizing → EuphoricEuphoric → SpicyGingeritis → SmellyJennerising → SneakyLaxative → FoggyMunchies → SedatingParanoia → CalmingShrinking → FocusedSneaky → Tropic Thunder

rows.Name: Energy Drink
rows.Description: Tasty energy drink filled with lots of yummy chemicals to make you feel refreshed. Removes the effects of drugs when consumed.
rows.Effect Replacements: Disorienting → ElectrifyingEuphoric → EnergizingFocused → ShrinkingFoggy → LaxativeGlowing → DisorientingSchizophrenic → BaldingSedating → MunchiesSpicy → EuphoricTropic Thunder → Sneaky

rows.Name: Motor Oil
rows.Description: Specially formulated oil used for lubricating the moving stuff in an engine.
rows.Effect Replacements: Energizing → MunchiesEuphoric → SedatingFoggy → ToxicMunchies → SchizophrenicParanoia → Anti-Gravity

rows.Name: Mega Bean
rows.Description: An unusually large bean of mysterious origin.
rows.Effect Replacements: Athletic → LaxativeCalming → GlowingEnergizing → CyclopeanFocused → DisorientingJennerising → ParanoiaSeizure-Inducing → FocusedShrinking → ElectrifyingSlippery → ToxicSneaky → CalmingThought-Provoking → Energizing

rows.Name: Chili
rows.Description: Yummy spicy chili.
rows.Effect Replacements: Anti-Gravity → Tropic ThunderAthletic → EuphoricLaxative → Long FacedMunchies → ToxicShrinking → RefreshingSneaky → Bright-Eyed

rows.Name: Battery
rows.Description: Small battery used to power stuff.
rows.Effect Replacements: Cyclopean → GlowingElectrifying → EuphoricEuphoric → ZombifyingLaxative → Calorie-DenseMunchies → Tropic ThunderShrinking → Munchies

rows.Name: Iodine
rows.Description: Chemical element that is an essential nutrient in a healthy diet. It also has other purposes.
rows.Effect Replacements: Calming → BaldingCalorie-Dense → GingeritisEuphoric → Seizure-InducingFoggy → ParanoiaRefreshing → Thought-ProvokingToxic → Sneaky

rows.Name: Addy
rows.Description: Like meth except legal. Used to stimulate cognition.
rows.Effect Replacements: Explosive → EuphoricFoggy → EnergizingGlowing → RefreshingLong Faced → ElectrifyingSedating → Gingeritis

rows.Image: censored version to fit TOS of FANDOM
rows.Name: Horse Semen
rows.Description: A big jug of ethically sourced horse semen.
rows.Effect Replacements: Anti-Gravity → CalmingGingeritis → RefreshingThought-Provoking → ElectrifyingSeizure-Inducing → Energizing
